nl: Some musicians love music.
canonical_fol: exists x.(exists y.(((Musician(x) -> Love(x, music)) & ((-((x = y)) & Musician(y)) -> Love(y, music)))))

positives.fol: exists v0.(exists v1.(((Musician(v0) -> Love(v0,music)) & ((-((v0 = v1)) & Musician(v1)) -> Love(v1,music)))))
exists v0.(exists v1.(((-((v0 = v1)) & Musician(v1)) -> Love(v1,music))))

contrastives.fol: all x.(exists y.(((Musician(x) -> Love(x, music)) & ((-((x = y)) & Musician(y)) -> Love(y, music)))))
exists x.(all y.(((Musician(x) -> Love(x, music)) & ((-((x = y)) & Musician(y)) -> Love(y, music)))))
exists x.(exists y.(((Musician(x) <-> Love(x, music)) & ((-((x = y)) & Musician(y)) -> Love(y, music)))))
exists x.(exists y.(((Musician(x) -> Love(x, music)) & ((-((x = y)) & Musician(y)) <-> Love(y, music)))))
exists x.(exists y.(((Musician(x) -> Love(x, music)) & (Love(y, music) -> (-((x = y)) & Musician(y))))))

extraction_json.nl: Some musicians love music.
